summary: Tested School CRM Data Transfer, Team Member Reports, and Mobile Responsiveness features. All three features are working correctly. Fixed missing quoted_price field in backend SchoolInquiry model.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added quoted_price and selected_offerings fields to SchoolInquiry and SchoolInquiryUpdate models
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Reference_School with quoted_price=75000, selected_offerings=[robotics, stem], and meeting notes for testing conversion modal Reference section
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three features tested and working: 1) School CRM conversion modal shows Reference from Previous Stages section with quoted_price, offerings, and meeting notes 2) Team Member Reports modal shows real metrics from backend API 3) Mobile responsiveness working on School CRM, Student CRM, and Educators pages with horizontally scrollable tabs and wrapped filters/buttons

school_crm_data_transfer.details: Reference from Previous Stages section shows quoted_price (₹75,000), selected_offerings (robotics, stem), and View Meeting Notes link in conversion modal

team_member_reports.details: Reports modal shows member info, students assigned/converted, schools assigned/converted/as_rm, support tickets, demos, and educators assigned metrics

mobile_responsiveness.details: School CRM, Student CRM, and Educators pages are mobile-friendly at 375x800 viewport with horizontally scrollable tabs and wrapped search/filter/button elements

bug_fixes_applied.quoted_price_field: Added quoted_price field to SchoolInquiry model (line 967) and SchoolInquiryUpdate model (line 1020) in server.py to enable data transfer from meeting stage to conversion modal
